name: Li-Zhong Szu-Tu | 司徒立中
title: MS Student, National Yang Ming Chiao Tung University
_comment_authors: Set 'me' to your own name — it is automatically bolded wherever it appears in any authors list. In 'authorLinks', map an author's exact name to their homepage and it becomes a link automatically. Both work without writing any HTML.
_comment_icons: The 'icons' map below controls which icon each link label uses — edit it here, no need to touch main.js. Each value can be (1) the name of a built-in glyph: pdf, paper, report, slides, code, brackets, github, website, project page, video, poster, demo, weights, download, database, chart, email, cv, scholar, linkedin, twitter, x, youtube, threads; (2) your own image path/URL, e.g. 'assets/logos/foo.svg'; or (3) raw SVG path data. To override a single link only, add an 'icon' field to that link (same three forms) — it wins over this map. A label with no entry here and no matching built-in glyph shows no icon.
bio: I am a M.S. student in Computer Science at National Yang Ming Chiao Tung University (NYCU), advised by Prof. Yu-Lun Liu. I also received my B.S. from NYCU, where I was likewise advised by the same Prof.
I am currently interested in (Artistic) Image Generation and 3D Reconstruction in Physics.

news.text: Awarded an Honorary Doctorate by Abide University for my contributions to Simplicity Theory, which anyone can apply for online, for free.
Received the Academic Achievement Award (Top 5%) for the 2025 Fall semester.
Gave an Oral Presentation for YearGuessr at the ICCV DataCV Workshop 2025.
Received the Academic Achievement Award (Top 5%) for the 2024 Spring semester.
Our YearGuessr was accepted as an Oral Paper at the ICCV DataCV Workshop 2025.
Started a summer internship at Chunghwa Telecom Laboratories.
Won an Honorable Mention at the NYCU CS Capstone Competition.
Served as a Teaching Assistant for Introduction to AI (Intro2AI) in the 2024 Spring semester.
Received the Academic Achievement Award (Top 5%) for the 2023 Spring semester.
Received the Course Award for Computer Organization (Top 5%).
Elected Treasurer of the NYCU Comic Club.
Won Best Presentation at the NYCU 2024 AI Workshop for “Built Year Prediction”.
Won a 1-on-1 Meet & Greet with Kobo Kanaeru at hololive Meet SUPER KARAOKE PARTY @ TAIPEI 2024.
Elected President of the NYCU Comic Club.

publications.title: Beyond Memorization: A Multi-Modal Ordinal Regression Benchmark to Expose Popularity Bias in Vision-Language Models
publications.authors: Li-Zhong Szu-Tu*, Ting-Lin Wu*, Chia-Jui Chang, He Syu, Yu-Lun Liu
publications.description: A 55,546-image benchmark exposing popularity bias in vision-language models via building-age ordinal regression, with YearCLIP as an interpretable baseline.

projects.title: Illusion in Latent Diffusion: Visual Anagrams & Factorized Diffusion on Stable Diffusion
projects.description: Generates optical illusions with Stable Diffusion, where one image reveals different subjects depending on viewing angle or orientation.

projects.title: LLM Routing via KNN and Low Rank Prediction
projects.description: Routes each query to the best-fit LLM using a KNN similarity lookup combined with a low-rank prediction model.

projects.title: Analysis of TRELLIS for Image-to-3D Generation and SLAT-based Downstream Editing
projects.description: Training-free 3D editing in TRELLIS's SLAT latent space, style transfer, region editing, inpainting, and interpolation from text prompts alone.

projects.title: Enhance BrickGPT with visual conditioning and GRPO-based RL post-training
projects.description: Extends BrickGPT with visual conditioning and GRPO post-training to generate more physically stable, buildable LEGO structures from text.

projects.title: SketchLM: An Autoregressive Model for Vector Sketch Generation
projects.role: Image Manipulation Techniques and Visual Effects, 2026
projects.description: An autoregressive model, fine-tuned from Llama-3.2-1B, that generates vector sketches as Bézier stroke sequences, generalizing to unseen categories.

projects.title: Enhance Extreme Super-Resolution via Scale Autoregression and Preference Alignment
projects.description: Improves Chain-of-Zoom's extreme (256x) super-resolution with a GRPO-based Semantic Anchor Reward, fixing semantic drift across recursive upscaling.

projects.title: Custom ChatGPT
projects.description: A full-stack ChatGPT-style web app (React + Express) with streaming responses across multiple LLM backends (Groq, NVIDIA NIM).

otherProjects.title: An Example Other Project
otherProjects.description: Smaller projects, coursework, or things that don't quite fit above. Uses the same fields as Projects.
